wafv2.webacl.fieldidentifier.Identifier.Description: The name of the username or password field, used in the `ManagedRuleGroupConfig` settings.   When the `PayloadType` is `JSON`, the identifier must be in JSON pointer syntax. For example `/form/username`. For information about the JSON Pointer syntax, see the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) documentation [JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) Pointer](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6901).   When the `PayloadType` is `FORM_ENCODED`, use the HTML form names. For example, `username`.
